title: bulbophyllum gibbosum
intro: Bulbophyllum gibbosum, also known as the waxy bulbophyllum, is a species of orchid that is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum gibbosum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make infusions or decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
